title: ouratea parviflora var. granulosa
intro: Ouratea parviflora var. granulosa, also known as the granulated ouratea or golden ouratea, is a plant species in the family Ochnaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Ouratea parviflora var. granulosa is used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, but its safe use and dosage should be carefully considered under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
